ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the business belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the business */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the business */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the business was established */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the business */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the business is verified */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the business */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "useful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review useful */,
  "funny_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review funny */,
  "cool_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review cool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was left */,
  "useful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the comment useful */,
  "funny_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the comment funny */,
  "cool_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the comment cool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business owner */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being claimed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user claiming the business */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the business was claimed */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the business claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "claimed_until" TEXT /* Date until the claim is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_owners_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the update */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_updates_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_verification" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification status */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being verified */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the verification (e.g., pending, verified, rejected) */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the business */,
  "verified_on" TEXT /* Date the business was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_verification_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_verification_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories_businesses" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
